name: bili-assistant
description: Bilibili desktop automation assistant built with Electron

scripts.release:zip: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$src='release/bili-assistant-win32-x64'; $dst='release/bili-assistant-win32-x64.zip'; if (!(Test-Path $src)) { throw 'Build output not found. Run npm run build:win first.' }; if (Test-Path $dst) { Remove-Item $dst -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path "$src/*" -DestinationPath $dst -Force"
scripts.release:win: npm run build:win && npm run release:zip
